{{Quote|This was our chance to apprehend Dooku and his cyborg General and finally ''end'' this war.|[[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], disappointed by the Battle of Boz Pity|<ref name="Star Wars—Free Comic Book Day 2005 Special">[[Free Comic Book Day 2005 Special]]</ref>}}
The '''Battle of Boz Pity''' was a major battle in the final year of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. Major [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] activity on [[Boz Pity/Legends|Boz Pity]] was discovered by [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] during his search for [[Asajj Ventress/Legends|Asajj Ventress]]. The [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] supported a mission to investigate, which led to a full scale battle with some of the greatest heroes from both sides of the war.

==Running the blockade==
{{Quote|You simply need to drop out of hyperspace between the blockade and Boz Pity. Master Tiin's forces can attack the blockade from behind, while the rest of us will be able to land undetected.|[[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], to [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]]|<ref name="Obsession 4" />}}
[[File:InterventionOnBozPity.jpg|thumb|left|200px|The ''Intervention'' crashed on Boz Pity]]
The [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatists]] had blockaded the graveyard [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Boz Pity/Legends|Boz Pity]] with over one hundred [[Warship/Legends|warships]]. The [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] plan was for the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] ''[[Intervention]]'' to come out of [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] between the blockade and the planet. [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]], perhaps the most gifted [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] in the Order, attempted to accomplish this, but brought the ship out of hyperspace too close to the planet's gravitational pull. The ''Intervention'' crashed on the surface of Boz Pity after launching all [[Starfighter/Legends|fighters]] and [[Escape pod/Legends|escape pods]], damaged beyond repair.<ref name="Obsession 4" /> In the space battle above, [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Denn Wessex]] commanded the [[Venator-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Venator''-class Star Destroyer]] ''[[Redoubt]]''.<ref name="Holonet" />

==The battle==
{{Quote|If we can capture the Confederacy leadership, we might be able to end this war.|[[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]]|<ref name="Obsession 4" />}}
[[Clone trooper/Legends|Clone trooper]] forces landing from the escape pods jettisoned from the ''Intervention'' were quickly engaged and sustained many casualties to the point of falling back when the [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi Generals]] arrived with reinforcements and then proceeded to quickly cut through the droid ranks. The forces of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] now fully engaged with the Confederacy of Independent Systems on the planet's surface, led by the Jedi Generals, were quick to engage in primarily targeting the [[Boz Pity Confederacy base|CIS medical facility]]. [[Jedi Master/Legends|Master]] [[Soon Bayts]] attempted to secure the entrance, quickly disposing of the cordon of droid guards with the first wave of troops. Soon after, [[General/Legends|General]] [[Grievous/Legends|Grievous]] appeared, and crushed Bayts' head with his hand, then proceeding to massacre their clone forces. Meanwhile, [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] infiltrated the CIS medical center. He discovered [[Asajj Ventress/Legends|Asajj Ventress]] in a [[Bacta tank/Legends|bacta tank]] and [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]] observing her. After a short conversation with Dooku, Asajj destroyed her bacta tank and engaged Obi-Wan.<ref name="Obsession 4" /><ref name="Obsession 5" />

Back on the battlefield [[Alpha (Advanced Recon Commando)|Alpha]], and the remainder of [[Squad Seven (Galactic Republic)|Squad Seven]], continued to repel the massive waves of droid forces. Grievous soon re-appeared in the heat of the battle, quickly taking care of several clones before proceeding to impale Alpha, [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] then proceeded to drop a [[Single Trooper Aerial Platform/Legends|STAP]] on the General, disabling him for the remainder of the battle.<ref name="Obsession 5" />
[[File:WinduvsDooku.jpg|thumb|250px|Windu and Dooku dueling.|left]]
Across the landscape, [[Kit Fisto/Legends|Kit Fisto]] and Anakin attempted to aid Alpha, before Obi-Wan was sent crashing through the wall of the Separatist base by Ventress. Their battle brought them back onto the battlefield, where Anakin joined in. Obi-Wan sabotaged Anakin's attempts to kill Asajj, though, believing she could still be redeemed. Dooku also left the medical center, but was soon after attacked by Mace Windu. The two of them engaged in a brief, inconclusive [[Lightsaber duel/Legends|duel]] before Dooku had his [[IG-100 MagnaGuard/Legends|MagnaGuards]] grapple the Jedi, disarming him and dragging him into a pit to facilitate Dooku's escape. With Windu occupied, Dooku headed for the evacuation point, taking Grievous's mangled body along with him. In the process of fleeing, Dooku allowed Mace Windu, a long-time rival and former good friend to involuntarily beat him.<ref name="Obsession 5" />

Meanwhile, Asajj disengaged from Obi-Wan and Anakin, and headed for the [[Sheathipede-class transport shuttle/Legends|Separatist shuttles]] away from the main battle. However, Dooku, not wishing her to delay his escape, ordered her shot, and left her behind as a distraction. Asajj attempted to kill Obi-Wan with a jagged steel fragment, but was thwarted by Anakin as the two Jedi approached her. She then expressed some measure of repentance, saying that perhaps Obi-Wan had been correct about her all along and appeared to die. Obi-Wan had her body transported to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. The blockade apparently retreated or was dispersed.<ref name="Obsession 5" />

==Aftermath==
{{Quote|I'm being sent to Boz Pity, where there are clones in need of a General.|[[Quinlan Vos/Legends|Quinlan Vos]]|<ref name="Republic 77">[[Republic 77|''Republic'' 77]]</ref>}}
[[File:Ventressfakedeath.jpg|thumb|250px|Obi-Wan holds "dying" Ventress.]]
Asajj Ventress had used [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] [[Meditation/Legends|meditation]] to feign her [[Death/Legends|death]]. She woke up in the
[[Sprint-class rescue craft/Legends|medical transport]] and ordered the [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] to take her away from the Jedi, the war, and Count Dooku.<ref name="Obsession 5" /> Commander Wessex's actions during the Battle of Boz Pity made him a hero and convinced [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] to make him a [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] shortly afterwards.<ref name="Holonet" />

Following the battle, [[Boz Pity/Legends|Boz Pity]] was made into a staging area for [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army]] units under [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] [[Quinlan Vos/Legends|Quinlan Vos]] fighting in the [[Outer Rim Sieges/Legends|Outer Rim Sieges]]. In addition, Vos was deployed to the area shortly after the events of the [[Battle of Coruscant/Legends|Battle of Coruscant]] and the events of the [[Siege of Saleucami/Legends|Siege of Saleucami]].<ref name="Republic 77" />

The [[22nd Air Combat Wing]], and its unit of [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commandos]] [[Ion Team]], were stationed on Boz Pity before being dispatched to the [[Battle of Murkhana (Clone Wars)|Battle of Murkhana]].<ref name="Dark Lord">''[[Dark Lord: The Rise of Darth Vader]]''</ref>
